name: Seventh Prism (Triangular)
description:
Activate Cast a Spell

Beloved by the church of the Seventh Veil, a seventh prism is a crystal that disperses its internal light, casting an aurora of color. If you use a seventh prism to cast , targets are for twice as long as their saving throw indicates. On a critical failure, the target is dazzled for 1 minute after its condition ends. Motes of shifting rainbow hues cloud the eyes, making it difficult to see details.
